title: Tool: draft_outreach (compound)
userStory: As Steve, I want a single tool that orchestrates the lookups for a draft so that the agent does not need to chain three calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Internally calls search_brain (similar past outreach), get_company (target context), and loads voice rules from a boot-time cache of voice-rule episodes
Returns structured { subject, body, channel, target_persona } the LLM uses to compose the actual message
Verify: invoking draft_outreach for a known company returns a structured draft referencing real past outreach
